name: publicWeb_getEvents
description: Returns upcoming or past events for a single kennel, optionally limited by count, absolute date cutoff, or relative days offset. Fee columns reflect the resolved fee: event-level override when set, otherwise the kennel's default fee. Supports summary mode to omit heavy text fields for list views.

parameters.name: PublicKennelId
parameters.description: Public kennel GUID. Used to resolve the internal KennelId. Empty rowset (Rowset 0) returned if not found — shim emits 404.

parameters.name: MaxEvents
parameters.description: Cap on the number of events returned. At least one of MaxEvents, DateCutoff, or DaysOffset must be supplied. May be combined with a date param (AND logic).

parameters.name: DateCutoff
parameters.description: Absolute far-boundary date (ISO 8601). Mutually exclusive with DaysOffset.

parameters.name: DaysOffset
parameters.description: Relative boundary in days from now (always positive; direction from IsFuture). Mutually exclusive with DateCutoff.

parameters.name: SummaryOnly
parameters.description: When 1, heavy text fields (EventDescription, EventUrl, w3wJson) are returned as NULL. Use for list views to reduce payload.

rowsets.name: CountHeader
rowsets.description: Always exactly 1 row when the kennel exists. Empty (0 rows) = kennel not found → shim returns 404. Prevents a false 404 when the kennel simply has no matching events.

columns.name: TotalMatchingEvents
columns.description: Total events matching the filter before the MaxEvents cap is applied.

rowsets.name: Events
rowsets.description: One row per event, ordered by EventStartDatetime ASC (upcoming) or DESC (past). Empty when no events match the filter.

columns.name: PublicEventId
columns.description: Public event GUID.

columns.name: EventNumber
columns.description: Sequential run number for the kennel. Used in public-facing URLs (/runs/{EventNumber}).

columns.name: EventName
columns.description: Display name of the event.

columns.name: EventStartDatetime
columns.description: Event start time with timezone offset.

columns.name: EventEndDatetime
columns.description: Event end time, or NULL if not set.

columns.name: EventTypeName
columns.description: Human-readable event type from DomainValues.EventThemeType. NULL when ThemeRunType has no matching row.

columns.name: EventPriceForMembers
columns.description: Resolved member fee: COALESCE(Event.EventPriceForMembers, Kennel.DefaultEventPriceForMembers). Event-level value takes precedence when set (non-NULL); kennel default used otherwise. 0 means free. Never NULL in the result.

columns.name: EventPriceForNonMembers
columns.description: Resolved non-member fee: COALESCE(Event.EventPriceForNonMembers, Kennel.DefaultEventPriceForNonMembers). Same resolution logic as EventPriceForMembers. Never NULL in the result.

columns.name: EventCurrencyType
columns.description: Resolved currency code: COALESCE(Event.EventCurrencyType, Kennel.DefaultEventCurrencyType). NULL only when neither the event nor the kennel has a currency set.

columns.name: Hares
columns.description: Comma-separated hare names, or NULL if not set.

columns.name: LocationOneLineDesc
columns.description: Single-line location description.

columns.name: LocationStreet
columns.description: Street address from SyncLocationStreet computed column (handles Facebook data override).

columns.name: LocationCity
columns.description: City from SyncLocationCity computed column.

columns.name: LocationPostCode
columns.description: Postcode from SyncLocationPostCode computed column.

columns.name: Latitude
columns.description: Latitude from SyncLatitude computed column. NULL if no coordinates set.

columns.name: Longitude
columns.description: Longitude from SyncLongitude computed column. NULL if no coordinates set.

columns.name: w3wJson
columns.description: What3Words JSON blob. NULL when SummaryOnly = 1.

columns.name: EventDescription
columns.description: Full event description from SyncDescription computed column. NULL when SummaryOnly = 1.

columns.name: EventImage
columns.description: Event image URL, or NULL if not set.

columns.name: EventUrl
columns.description: External event URL (e.g. Facebook event). NULL when SummaryOnly = 1.

columns.name: Tags1
columns.description: Bitflag column 1 for run tags. Decoded client-side against the RunTag enum.

columns.name: Tags2
columns.description: Bitflag column 2 for run tags.

columns.name: Tags3
columns.description: Bitflag column 3 for run tags (reserved for future use).

columns.name: IsCountedRun
columns.description: 1 if this event counts toward a member's run tally.

feeResolutionLogic.description: Fee fields follow a two-level fallback. The event record stores a per-event fee override; NULL means 'use the kennel default'. The SP resolves this at query time so callers always receive the effective fee.
precedence: 1. Event.EventPriceForMembers / EventPriceForNonMembers / EventCurrencyType — per-event override, set only when the event charges a different fee from the kennel default
2. Kennel.DefaultEventPriceForMembers / DefaultEventPriceForNonMembers / DefaultEventCurrencyType — kennel-wide default; applied when event fields are NULL
notes: EventPriceForMembers and EventPriceForNonMembers are never NULL in the result — kennel defaults (DECIMAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0) guarantee a value
EventCurrencyType may still be NULL if neither the event nor the kennel has a currency configured
0 means free — callers should display 'Free' rather than '0.00'

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never make EventPriceForMembers or EventPriceForNonMembers nullable in the result — callers depend on non-null values after the kennel default fallback
